title: SEVERE WEATHER MOTEL VOUCHERS - 211info
text: COMMUNITY CONNECTION OF GRANT COUNTY SEVERE WEATHER MOTEL VOUCHERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides limited motel vouchers during severe cold weather. 530 E Main Street Suite 6 John Day, OR 97845 Eligibility: Income restrictions apply Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 620-3826 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 620-3826 Main phone Main phone (541) 620-3826 Amy Smetana Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Grant County Services: Homeless Motel Vouchers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
